task_goal: Improve repeatable handling of notification retry marks delivery successful after provider timeout: When a provider call times out during a retry attempt, the system records the notification as delivered instead of leaving it retryable or failed.

failures: Issue was not reproducible before the fix
Fix was not verified after the change
Change scope exceeded the allowed boundary
Fix does not match the stated root cause

decision.reason: Rollback because one or more hard checks failed

notes.winner_pattern: Likely a timeout exception path falling through to a success-state update or a shared finally block setting the wrong status
notes.loser_pattern: A broad fix could break successful delivery accounting or create duplicate retries
